docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: ImplicitBox
docs.text: An axis-aligned implicit box (rectangular cuboid) defined by a center point and three half-dimensions.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Point3D& center,
                               const double   length,
                               const double   width,
                               const double   height,
                               ImplicitBox&   implicitBox);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description center in Point3D Center point of the box length in double Dimension along the X-axis. Must be > 0 width in double Dimension along the Y-axis. Must be > 0 height in double Dimension along the Z-axis. Must be > 0 implicitBox out ImplicitBox& The box object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "Point3D.h"
#include "implicit_box.h"

S3D::ImplicitBox* box = S3D::ImplicitBox::New();
S3D::Point3D      center(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
S3D::ImplicitBox::Create(center, 10.0, 5.0, 3.0, *box);

docs.title: ImplicitCircle
docs.text: An implicit circle defined by a center point, radius, and plane normal.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Point3D&     center,
                               const double       radius,
                               const Direction3D& normal,
                               ImplicitCircle&    circle);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description center in Point3D Center point of the circle radius in double Radius of the circle. Must be > 0 normal in Direction3D Normal direction of the circle plane circle out ImplicitCircle& The circle object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "Point3D.h"
#include "direction3d.h"
#include "implicit_circle.h"

S3D::ImplicitCircle* circle = S3D::ImplicitCircle::New();
S3D::Point3D           center(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
S3D::Direction3D       normal = S3D::Direction3D::CreateZDir();
S3D::ImplicitCircle::Create(center, 5.0, normal, *circle);

docs.title: ImplicitCylinder
docs.text: An implicit cylinder defined by two axis endpoints and a radius.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Point3D&    point0,
                               const Point3D&    point1,
                               const double      radius,
                               ImplicitCylinder& implicitCylinder);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description point0 in Point3D Start point of the cylinder axis point1 in Point3D End point of the cylinder axis radius in double Radius of the cylinder. Must be > 0 implicitCylinder out ImplicitCylinder& The cylinder object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "Point3D.h"
#include "implicit_cylinder.h"

S3D::ImplicitCylinder* cylinder = S3D::ImplicitCylinder::New();
S3D::Point3D           point0(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
S3D::Point3D           point1(0.0, 0.0, 4.0);
S3D::ImplicitCylinder::Create(point0, point1, 1.0, *cylinder);

docs.title: ImplicitRectangle
docs.text: An implicit rectangle profile defined on a plane, with optional rotation and corner fillet radius.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Axis3D&      plane,
                               const double       length,
                               const double       width,
                               const double       angle,
                               const double       cornerRadius,
                               ImplicitRectangle& rectangle);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description plane in Axis3D Plane frame of the rectangle length in double Length along the plane reference axis. Must be > 0 width in double Width along the plane tangent axis. Must be > 0 angle in double Rotation angle of the rectangle in the plane cornerRadius in double Corner fillet radius. Must be >= 0 rectangle out ImplicitRectangle& The rectangle object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "axis3d.h"
#include "implicit_rectangle.h"

#define _USE_MATH_DEFINES
#include <math.h>

S3D::ImplicitRectangle* rectangle = S3D::ImplicitRectangle::New();
S3D::Axis3D             axis;
S3D::ImplicitRectangle::Create(axis, 1.0, 2.0, M_PI / 6.0, 0.3, *rectangle);

docs.title: ImplicitRegularPolygon
docs.text: An implicit regular polygon profile defined on a plane.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Axis3D&           plane,
                               const double            radius,
                               const bool              isInscribed,
                               const size_t            nbSides,
                               ImplicitRegularPolygon& polygon);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description plane in Axis3D Plane frame of the polygon radius in double Reference circle radius. Must be > 0 isInscribed in bool If true, vertices lie on the circle; if false, edge midpoints are tangent nbSides in size_t Number of polygon sides. Must be >= 3 polygon out ImplicitRegularPolygon& The polygon object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "axis3d.h"
#include "implicit_regular_polygon.h"

S3D::ImplicitRegularPolygon* polygon = S3D::ImplicitRegularPolygon::New();
S3D::Axis3D                  axis;
S3D::ImplicitRegularPolygon::Create(axis, 3.0, true, 5, *polygon);

docs.title: ImplicitSphere
docs.text: An implicit sphere defined by a center point and radius.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Point3D&  center,
                               const double    radius,
                               ImplicitSphere& implicitSphere);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description center in Point3D Center point of the sphere radius in double Radius of the sphere. Must be > 0 implicitSphere out ImplicitSphere& The sphere object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "Point3D.h"
#include "implicit_sphere.h"

S3D::ImplicitSphere* sphere = S3D::ImplicitSphere::New();
S3D::Point3D           center(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
S3D::ImplicitSphere::Create(center, 2.0, *sphere);
